title: AuditVerdict v0.3 DSSE Envelope
description: HISTORICAL DESIGN SNAPSHOT — NOT LOADED AT RUNTIME. SSOT = src/channels/audit-verdict.ts (types + parsers) + the cli.ts send gate + paired tests. DO NOT EDIT to change behavior; edit the TS and tests. See decisions/cluster-6.md Decision I. | Cycle 1 substrate-core schema migration 003 — wraps the audit-verdict body in a DSSE (Dead Simple Signing Envelope) per https://github.com/secure-systems-lab/dsse/blob/master/protocol.md for tamper-evident per-message Ed25519 signature chains (resolves OBS-A: HMAC framing was incorrect crypto-primitive naming per Delta Phase 0 fact-base catch). The JSONL line `body` field becomes a DSSE envelope JSON for new audit-verdicts; legacy v0.1/v0.2 raw audit-verdict bodies continue to parse via parseAuditVerdictBody back-compat dispatch. PAE solves envelope-level type-confusion (payloadType + LEN-prefix prevents byte substitution); JCS solves payload-level serialization-determinism (RFC 8785 canonical-JSON ensures semantically-identical bodies encode to identical bytes across implementations — Bravo Obs-CC-1 + Delta lens-prep finding). The `payload` field carries the base64-encoded canonical-JSON-RFC-8785 of the inner v0.2 AuditVerdictBody (schema 002_v0.2.json). The `signatures` array carries Ed25519 attestations; each entry's `keyid` is the NATO identifier (advisory; NOT signature-covered per DSSE §2 PAE input); each entry's `sig` is the base64-encoded Ed25519 signature over PAE(payloadType, payload). See src/channels/audit-signature-chain.ts for DSSE primitives + src/channels/audit-verdict.ts parseAuditVerdictV0_3Wrapped for parser dispatch + src/channels/canonical-json.ts for JCS-subset helper. See plans/cycle-1-substrate-core-slice-plan-2026-05-26.md §2.2 + §2.6 + §4.2 for envelope shape + migration narrative + cross-pair contract.

payloadType.description: MIME-type-style payload identifier per DSSE spec; enables envelope-type dispatch on read-side. Constant for audit-verdict envelopes; future cohort cycles may add new payloadTypes for new structured kinds. RFC 6838 structure (application/vnd.<vendor>.<product>+<suffix>).

payload.description: Base64-encoded canonical-JSON-RFC-8785-subset of inner AuditVerdictBody (schema 002_v0.2.json). Signature scope (PAE input) covers this base64 string verbatim; envelope-level fields (payloadType, signatures[i].keyid) are NOT in signature scope per DSSE §2. Canonical encoding via src/channels/canonical-json.ts canonicalJson() helper (key sort + nested recursion; RFC 8785 subset documented in module JSDoc).

signatures.description: Non-empty array of signer attestations per DSSE spec §3. Cycle 1 ships single-signer per envelope (each NATO signs their own audit-verdicts); future cycles may extend to multi-signer for compromise-revocation co-signing per OQ-4.

keyid.description: NATO identifier (e.g., charlie); verifier resolves this against the cohort's pubkey trust set (per PR-A3 key-surface module + PR-A4 audit bootstrap CLI verb). Outer-envelope advisory; NOT signature-covered per DSSE §2 PAE input. Line-vs-envelope cross-check on JSONL `identity` catches keyid-tamper at verify time (HYBRID lock identity-tamper-detection).

sig.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature over PAE(payloadType, payload). RFC 8032 Ed25519 (asymmetric signature per RFC 8032; not HMAC per OBS-A rename). Verifier reproduces PAE input from envelope payloadType + payload + verifies signature against resolved pubkey.

x-claude-conductor.supersedes_migration_note: v0.1 raw-unsigned + v0.2 raw-signed bodies remain valid + parseable per back-compat discipline (parseAuditVerdictBody unchanged); v0.3 introduces DSSE wrapping as a new shape at the body-field level. Send-side validation in cli.ts requires new audit-verdicts to be DSSE-wrapped post-PR-A6 audit verify CLI verb landing; current PR-A5 ships schema + parser dispatch only.
x-claude-conductor.next_migration: 004 (v0.4 lineage envelope embedded in payload; Pair A Layer 2; gated on PR-A5 schema-shape merge per Pair A §7.1 R-A5)
x-claude-conductor.audit_shadow_pen: Pair B Delta + Pair A Alpha + Pair A Bravo
x-claude-conductor.cross_pair_contract: plans/cycle-1-substrate-extension-slice-plan-2026-05-26.md §4 (Pair A Layer 2 v0.4 lineage envelope embeds inside payload)
x-claude-conductor.cohort_ratify_audit_trail_note: Ratify body_refs + session UUIDs + channel id documented in PR commit message body + cohort channel (not in schema file to keep schema operator-portable + free of bernstein arc-specific anonymization-leak class identifiers per check-generic-paths CGP-001/CGP-004 lessons from PR-A1).
